blocker: No GPU/vllm/torch on this arm64 mac; real vLLM server cannot start. Shim validated against vLLM OpenAI wire contract (9/9 unit tests + live stdlib-mock HTTP round-trip), no live frontier eval run.
one_line: Built+validated a local vLLM serving scaffold: launch script (Qwen2.5-1.5B), OpenAI-compatible drop-in client shim matching agent.llm.call, shared config, 9 passing tests, and a documented native-provider patch; GPU blocker documented.
